title: Analytics - Login
scenario: Verify that login and logout events are logged in Firebase with correct default elements and that event counts update after a delay.
steps: Open Login event in Firebase - page opens properly and contains default elements: Graph for this event, Events in last 30 minutes, Event count by Country, Event count by Gender, Events per session, App Version, App build, App Environment, Screen name, User Type, Action.
Trigger login and logout event on mobile.
After some time, verify that event count for related elements increases.
expected: Event counts for related elements increase after triggering login and logout events.
